description: Connects the QED four-loop domain (Laporta master integrals) to the number theory domain (transcendental constant basis, PSLQ integer relation detection) through the Q335 framework. Tests whether the six Laporta integrals are expressible in the known transcendental basis or represent genuinely new constants.
thesis: The six Laporta four-loop master integrals are genuinely new transcendental constants, independent of all known constants (pi, zeta values, logarithms, polylogarithms, MZVs, alternating Euler sums) with integer coefficients up to 100000.
formula: PSLQ: find integers a_i such that a_0*C + a_1*c_1 + ... + a_n*c_n = 0, or certify no such integers exist within bounds
